subcodes.title: Words to Mary Lucas and other pilgrims, spoken on 1905-02-04
subcodes.first_line: The Christians explain these verses by saying they refer to the Holy Spirit which came to the disciples after Christ's departure.
subcodes.subjects: @interpretation of words and passages in scripture, @Christian rejection of Baha'u'llah and the Baha'i Faith, @prophecy and fulfillment
